data.current_description: Update an existing appointment.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing appointment with new scheduling or status information. Accepts partial updates via the AppointmentUpdate schema - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated appointment object. data.current_description: Cancel an existing appointment.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an existing appointment by appointment ID. This operation removes the appointment from the schedule and updates its status to cancelled. data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about the operation's effects. Added information about what happens to the appointment record, status changes, return value, and authentication requirement for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Schedule a new appointment.
data.description_suggestion: Schedule a new appointment for a patient with a provider. Accepts an AppointmentCreate request containing patient ID, provider ID, appointment date/time, and appointment type. Returns the newly created appointment record with an assigned appointment ID. The appointment is immediately visible in the practice schedule and available for patient confirmation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks essential details about required inputs (patient, provider, date/time), what is returned (appointment ID), and the side effect of making the appointment visible in the schedule. AI agents need this information to understand what data to provide and what happens after creation.

message: Operation 'getAppointment' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Description lacks detail about what appointment information is returned. AI agents need to know what fields are available (patient info, provider, date/time, status, notes) to determine if this operation provides needed data.

data.current_description: Retrieve a single appointment by identifier.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a single appointment record by identifier. Returns complete appointment details including patient information, provider, scheduled date/time, appointment type, status, and any associated notes. Requires a valid appointment ID path parameter.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about what appointment information is returned. AI agents need to know what fields are available (patient info, provider, date/time, status, notes) to determine if this operation provides needed data.

message: Operation 'updateEncounter' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about partial update support, return value, and examples of updatable fields to help AI agents understand what can be modified and what to expect in the response.

data.current_description: Update an existing clinical encounter.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing clinical encounter record with new information. Accepts partial updates - only provided fields in the request body will be modified. Returns the updated encounter object with all current details. Common updates include visit notes, diagnoses, procedures, and clinical assessments.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about partial update support, return value, and examples of updatable fields to help AI agents understand what can be modified and what to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'listClaims' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about filtering capabilities and pagination mechanics. Enhanced to explain available filters, what claim information is returned, and how to use pagination parameters for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of insurance claims.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of insurance claims submitted to payers. Supports filtering by status, date range, patient, provider, and other criteria through query parameters. Returns a paginated response containing claim records with submission status, amounts, and payer information. Use pagination parameters to navigate through large result sets.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about filtering capabilities and pagination mechanics. Enhanced to explain available filters, what claim information is returned, and how to use pagination parameters for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'submitClaim' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description needs significant enhancement. Added details about required input fields, what the operation returns, and the resulting state change (claim queued for transmission) to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Submit a new insurance claim.
data.description_suggestion: Submits a new insurance claim to the payer for a patient encounter. Requires claim details including patient information, service dates, diagnosis codes, procedure codes, and billing amounts in the request body. Returns the created claim object with a unique claim ID and initial status (typically 'submitted' or 'pending'). The claim is queued for transmission to the insurance company.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description needs significant enhancement. Added details about required input fields, what the operation returns, and the resulting state change (claim queued for transmission) to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'listPayments' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about available filters and what payment information is returned. Enhanced to explain filtering options, returned payment details, and pagination usage for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of payment transactions.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of payment transactions recorded in the practice management system. Supports filtering by date range, patient, payment method, status, and provider through query parameters. Returns payment records including amounts, dates, payment methods, and reconciliation status. Use pagination parameters to navigate through large result sets.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about available filters and what payment information is returned. Enhanced to explain filtering options, returned payment details, and pagination usage for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'recordPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description needs enhancement. Added details about required input fields, what is returned, and the resulting state change (payment recorded and available for reconciliation) to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.

data.current_description: Record a new payment transaction.
data.description_suggestion: Records a new payment transaction in the practice management system. Requires payment details including patient or account reference, amount, payment method, and transaction date in the request body. Returns the created payment record with a unique payment ID and timestamp. The payment is immediately recorded and available for reconciliation and reporting.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description needs enhancement. Added details about required input fields, what is returned, and the resulting state change (payment recorded and available for reconciliation) to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.

data.current_description: Create a new clinical encounter.

Requires authentication.
